title: FloatFishing
description: A cozy fishing experience focused on relaxation and peaceful vibes.
body:
# **FloatFishing**

FloatFishing is a modpack focused on a fresh perspective of fishing in Minecraft. A lush world, new structures, and a great cooking system await you.
## **🎣 FISHING**

Experience new fishing mechanics with the Starcatcher mod: use various baits, hooks, and floats. Discover hidden secrets and enjoy a huge amount of new content in oceans and rivers, including many new fish species, marine mobs, and faster boats.
## **🌍 WORLD**

New world generation complements the Minecraft experience with new structures that won't let you get bored while traveling. The loot mechanics have also been changed: you will now encounter locked chests with improved loot.
## **🍳 COOKING**

A simple but deep cooking system with the Farmer's Delight mod. It will keep things interesting if you need a break from fishing, allowing you to create a variety of useful foods.
## **🚀 OPTIMIZATION**

The modpack is well-optimized. You won't have any performance issues or FPS drops on your computer.![BANNER](https://i.ibb.co/mrN4kbJT/dfdddd.png)
